discovery: PATTERN: All tools with return_schema wrapping {status,data} fail because jsonschema.validate(result.get('data'), return_schema) validates just the data value. Fix: unwrap return_schema to describe data content directly. Affects at least: PDBeSIFTS, PDBeValidation, Pfam, PlantReactome, PomBase series.
